textByHash.062d4a9b680357753fc41728ede708b2b3f8e1c2: I ask coins to cover my costs.
textByHash.1fb95d9b4e9e5312eabc7b06538c71424ed16245: They'll be in Prifddinas of course. With the city restored there's not much reason for them to come out here.
textByHash.6734d1b8ab0da8963e9e2b4921bae3ab122d029e: They'll be in the Underground Pass, preparing for the fight against Lord Iorwerth.
textByHash.955561d5d44f85fe0f7b6ac7b6dbc257c733d67c: Well I can do that if you want.
